'''mayoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enam|enam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enam|enam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mayoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæyereth|mæyereth]] || [[word:mæyerej|mæyerej]] || [[word:mæyeresh|mæyeresh]] || [[word:mæyere|mæyere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mayoyoroth|mayoyoroth]] || [[word:mayoyoroj|mayoyoroj]] || [[word:mayoyorosh|mayoyorosh]] || [[word:mayoyoro|mayoyoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mayoroth|mayoroth]] || [[word:mayoroj|mayoroj]] || [[word:mayorosh|mayorosh]] || [[word:mayoro|mayoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mayofroth|mayofroth]] || [[word:mayofroj|mayofroj]] || [[word:mayofrosh|mayofrosh]] || [[word:mayofrof|mayofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mayorotho|mayorotho]] || [[word:mayorojo|mayorojo]] || [[word:mayorosho|mayorosho]] || [[word:mayoroko|mayoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mayoroth|mayoroth]] || [[word:mayoroj|mayoroj]] || [[word:mayorosh|mayorosh]] || [[word:mayoro|mayoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mayorothol|mayorothol]] || [[word:mayorojol|mayorojol]] || [[word:mayoroshol|mayoroshol]] || [[word:mayorokol|mayorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mayorothotho|mayorothotho]] || [[word:mayorojojo|mayorojojo]] || [[word:mayoroshosho|mayoroshosho]] || [[word:mayoroko|mayoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mayorothon|mayorothon]] || [[word:mayorojon|mayorojon]] || [[word:mayoroshon|mayoroshon]] || [[word:mayorokon|mayorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mayorothoro|mayorothoro]] || [[word:mayorojoro|mayorojoro]] || [[word:mayoroshoro|mayoroshoro]] || [[word:mayorokoro|mayorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
